name: stale-pr-digest
description: Daily morning digest that identifies pull requests that have been open for more than 24 hours without receiving an automated review. Posts a summary to the team Google Chat space so engineers can prioritise unreviewed work.
prompt: Run the stale PR check across all configured repositories. List every open PR that has been waiting more than 24 hours without a bot review comment. Group them by repository. Post the digest to the PR review Google Chat space using the send_message tool. Format: one line per PR with the PR title, author, age in hours, and a direct link.

on_empty.message: ✅ *Daily PR Digest* — No stale PRs today. All pull requests have been reviewed within 24 hours.
